title: Ubiquiti ECS-24-PoE - UniFi Enterprise Campus 24 PoE switch
description: Notice: For this product, we provide individual project-based pricing depending on the configuration, scope, and conditions of the project. For more information, please contact your sales representative Ubiquiti UniFi Enterprise Campus 24 PoE is a device from the Enterprise series designed for enterprise environments This 24-port L2/L3 PoE switch offers 8x 2.5G Ethernet, 16x 10G Ethernet (all ports support PoE+++ 90W), and 2x SFP28. All ports are equipped with Etherlighting technology, which facilitates visual cable management. The switch features dual redundant hot-swap power supplies with 600W each, providing a PoE budget of 450W (or 1050W in shared mode, which will be available in future firmware versions). Optionally, 1200W power supplies can be purchased to increase the PoE budget. Efficient cooling is… UniFi devices are centrally managed using the UniFi Network Server application. The application is available for download on Windows / Linux / macOS, or a standalone hardware controller can be purchased. The application is also included in selected UniFi routers Device (2) Rack-mount rails (2) 600W hot-swap power supplies (4) Hot-swap fans (2) Power cables (2) Rack-mount brackets Mounting kit
